chrome_history.name: Chrome History
chrome_history.description: Local Google Chrome browsing history ingestion for the timeline

profile.label: Profile
profile.description: Chrome profile directory to read, such as Default or Profile 1.

sync_mode.label: Sync Mode
sync_mode.description: Control how Chrome history should be synchronized.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Sync Interval
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often Chrome history should be synced on an interval schedule.

merge_window_minutes.label: Merge Window (minutes)
merge_window_minutes.description: Visits to the same page within this window are merged into one timeline item.

lookback_hours.label: Lookback Hours
lookback_hours.description: How many hours to backfill before a cursor exists.

max_items_per_sync.label: Max Items Per Sync
max_items_per_sync.description: Maximum number of history records to ingest in one run.

initial_sync_policy.from_now: Only new records from now on

activation.title: Enable Chrome History
activation.description: Chrome history contains sensitive local data. Choose how the first sync should seed the timeline before this source starts running.

initial_sync_policy.from_now: Only new records from now on

filters.domains_description: Visits whose normalized domain matches any regex via partial search are skipped before AI analysis. Use ^...$ for exact matches.
filters.keywords_description: Visits whose URL or title contains any of these keywords are skipped before AI analysis. Case-insensitive substring match, not regex.
